feed.title: 9GAG
feed.subtitle: Hot posts from 9gag.com (no native feed; parsed from the page's window._config JSON). NSFW posts are tagged [NSFW].

entry.title: Toe-tally killing it.
The Jackass: Best and Last drone show delivered exactly the kind of chaos you hope for.
Years pass. Friendships remain. The chaos stays exactly the same.
Need unbend it
The dude chose violence for the day
Pretty neat!
They Rarely Pass The Ball To Him .hhhmmm
When she had enough
Priorities are clearly in order
This selfish player refused to pass the ball to Haaland costing Norway the World Cup.
Efficiency levels hitting different
Tattoo removal
Jared Leto's last 4 films have lost an estimated $970 million. He has no upcoming film roles
Million
When local politicians made stealing legal
The best dog ever
Could be
Go Latina dancing
Know the 30/30 rule
Roman dodecahedron
Make this out of context
2 of my college professors also said Newton as their number 1 scientist.
Nice camo

Classic long game setup
This is the start of the post
I wish I knew magic
Looks like the perfect spot to take a nap
Do not walk dogs in New York (it is haram!)

The man who almost conquered them all
Cotton candy clouds
She is allowed to vote

Anne Hathaway
Impossibru

Doing my part

Efficiency at its finest
Right?

Weird night
Let's play a game I call .....next
Yeah! Asian science!
The guys probably already guess what the bang is, but they didn't have the heart to tell her.
Islamic Regime supporters pulling out Ayatollah Khamanei’s’ coffin from a portable Freezer. This looks like something from the Walking Dead.
Happens
Wishful thinking
The Soviet Union is dead, but Soviet-era jokes are back
This is how based our cartoons were. It taught us to think without we even realised it.
Now I see why he used the mask
Here’s 1 post 4 U

It’s bad..
Ya dense

The culture
The past is lost. The past is a lie
Challenging wank
No she is judge no more
A gif(t) for you
So they run out of reasons to put here...

Bacon
A male goose attacked a man near his female. When the man fell down, the goose walked proudly to his mate.

The quiver in his voice

Spot the legendary Greek Warrior
He did everything for her, sacrificed his career, even donated his blood, paid for her treatments, but in the end she left him because she wanted to "discover herself"
Only the really smart people knows the answer...

Dont google it
I was saved

Celebrating
I thought maybe someone out there needed this
Haters will say it's A.I.
Oxford mathematician reveals a fast way to tie your shoes y'inquisition
Level of wealth money cannot buy

43rd bday and wife and son didn’t even get me a 50 cent card or even a text message. I’m always expected to spend thousands of dollars on them on holiday and bdays. Not anymore. At least I got my 9gag degenerates. Fock you and see you tomorrow
Safety is number one priority
"They're eating the dogs. The people that came in they're eating the cats. They're eating the pets of the people that live there."

You ready?
When you date a farmer girl
Maybe his football team lost
